revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Any here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Any for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- | [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>style="background: #FFD; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="any table-any"|{{{1|Any}}}<noinclude> |}
